title: gentianella luteomarginata
intro: Gentianella luteomarginata, also known as yellow-fringed gentian, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for treating various ailments. Gentianella luteomarginata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
